# UiHost.DialectRegistry property

The complete §26.6 registry, in spec order: all 19 distinct names with their kind and direction. The host validates a dialect message's `method` against this table byte-for-byte (spec §26.6, R-26.5-a).

public static IReadOnlyList<DialectRegistryEntry> DialectRegistry { get; }
